title: oSzoukaua's: Just DYE already!
body:
# Description: Ads more mays/recipes for getting every dye in Minecraft! no more super specific and niche recipes only!

_These are just some of the recipes_
Dye Recipes ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/625f8eedc6ca7610148de0ebf80dc103fa13ff8c_0.webp) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63568e472445c46564e74b491ba16f1cfea2d48f.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b381d0a088efd905db17c31b76ee3c7659d3728_0.webp) ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/521c8fd09ba67f1cd52274331567ba6a8cef4353.png) ![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0664c8b757bb3d28ec89c31f1c43f585594d112c_0.webp) ![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cbd6f88d07c9b4356256269edd2a2d39f3ee9f_0.webp) ![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891933e714753caf98efc3a67020df503a1d0746_0.webp) ![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68521ccaf778f65673f316179ce3817c23b6bc98.png) ![9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e134a781b441c02654ab4738106b02b3064b5240.png) ![10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de9c33b1ffe0ca6b8f12c45c68414d6eaa34b4a.png)


_Other recipes are made in the furnace_

## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
